breakfast_recipe_logs.description: Content for the Recipe Log Event.

inventory-item-added.description: Published when a new inventory item is added to the system.

topping-created.description: Published when a new topping is added to the toppings catalogue.

waffle-batch-completed.description: Published when a waffle batch is completed.

dailySpecialOrderedEvent.description: Published when a daily special is ordered.

orderId.description: Order ID for the daily special.

remainingOrders.description: Remaining order count for this special.

orderedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was placed (ISO 8601 format).

inventoryItemAddedEvent.description: Published when a new inventory item is added to the system.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g. kg, litres, units).

addedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was added (ISO 8601 format).

inventoryStockUpdatedEvent.description: Published when an inventory item's stock level changes.

menuAvailabilityChangedEvent.description: Published when a menu item becomes available or unavailable.

isAvailable.description: Whether the item is now available.

messageHeaders.description: Message headers, in both legacy and CloudEvents formats.

pancakeBatchCompletedEvent.description: Published when a pancake batch is completed.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch was completed (ISO 8601 format).

recipeLogEvent.description: Content for the Recipe Log Event.

loggedAt.description: Timestamp when the recipe was logged (ISO 8601 format).

reservationCancelledEvent.description: Published when a reservation is cancelled.

cancelledAt.description: Timestamp when the reservation was cancelled (ISO 8601 format).

reservationConfirmedEvent.description: Published when a reservation is confirmed.

confirmedAt.description: Timestamp when the reservation was confirmed (ISO 8601 format).

staffMemberAddedEvent.description: Published when a new staff member is registered in the system.

name.description: Full name of the staff member.

role.description: Role assigned to the staff member.

addedAt.description: Timestamp when the staff member was added (ISO 8601 format).

toppingCreatedEvent.description: Published when a new topping is added to the toppings catalogue.

category.description: Category of the topping (e.g. fruit, sauce, nut).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the topping was created (ISO 8601 format).

waffleBatchCompletedEvent.description: Published when a waffle batch is completed.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch was completed (ISO 8601 format).
